## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change? One or two sentences. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Closes #NN -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Test (`test:`)
- [ ] Chore (`chore:`)

## Verification

- [ ] `go fmt ./...` clean
- [ ] `go vet ./...` clean
- [ ] `go build ./...` succeeds
- [ ] `go test ./...` all passing
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under the current date

## Screenshots / GIFs

<!-- For TUI changes, include a recording. Use `vhs` or `asciinema`. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I opened an issue first and got alignment on scope
- [ ] My commits follow the prefix convention (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] I haven't introduced cross-platform code (gone is macOS-only)
- [ ] File removal still goes through macOS Trash, never `rm`
- [ ] I read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` ground rules
